test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sort_mixed ( uint_col UInt64, str_col String ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO sort_mixed SELECT rand64() AS uint_col, randomPrintableASCII(rand() % 32 + 1) AS str_col FROM numbers(2000000)
test.query: SELECT * FROM sort_mixed ORDER BY uint_col, str_col FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
SELECT * FROM sort_mixed ORDER BY str_col, uint_col FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
SELECT * FROM sort_mixed ORDER BY uint_col ASC, str_col DESC FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
